Type Method# newCapsule(withHeight:radii:radialSegments:verticalSegments:hemisphereSegments:geometryType:inwardNormals:allocator:)

iOS 11.0+iPadOS 11.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.13+tvOS 11.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
class func newCapsule(
    withHeight height: Float,
    radii: vector_float2,
    radialSegments: Int,
    verticalSegments: Int,
    hemisphereSegments: Int,
    geometryType: MDLGeometryType,
    inwardNormals: Bool,
    allocator: (any MDLMeshBufferAllocator)?
) -> Self
```
